description: After signing a contract with a new subcontractor, the contract manager must issue a formal Notice to Proceed (NTP).

nodes.task_description: Generate a Notice to Proceed document using the standard template for the specified subcontractor.

expected_outcome.value: A new NTP document is created.

nodes.task_description: Set the official start date in the NTP and send it to the subcontractor.

expected_outcome.value: The NTP is sent to the subcontractor with the correct start date.
